change_reason: WI-4327 Phase-1 Foundation: insert DCL-HARNESS-STATE-SOT-READER-CONTRACT-001 per owner AUQ approval.
explicit_change_request: Owner AskUserQuestion (Phase-1 batch this session): 'Approve DCL-READER-CONTRACT-001 v1 as drafted'.
full_content:
DCL-HARNESS-STATE-SOT-READER-CONTRACT-001 v1 - Mechanical reader-entrypoint discipline.

Constraint: Every reader of harness-state roles, identities, or capabilities MUST go through the canonical entrypoint:
- Python imports: from groundtruth_kb.harness_projection import read_roles, read_identity, read_capabilities
- Shell: gt harness {roles, identity, capabilities}.
- Direct json.load / tomllib.load reads of the 3 SoTs are FORBIDDEN outside the entrypoint module.

Enforcement: Static-grep assertion + doctor _check_harness_state_sot_consistency (3-layer check committed in commit 0ee3d567).

Severity: blocking. Affected by: GOV-HARNESS-STATE-SOT-CONSOLIDATION-001.

Owner AUQ approval captured this session (Phase-1 batch AUQ 2 of 4).
